info.title: Fenergo Nebula Policy Query
info.description: Policy Query API is part of FenX eco-system to query for Requirement Sets, Requirements, Data Groups and Data Group Fields Instances. All the operations require valid access token obtained from Identity service.

get.description:
This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on 2024-08-01. Use /api/data-group/lite instead.
Returns the list of all data groups.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: PolicyConfigurationAccess, PolicySearch

parameters.name: onlyPublishedAndArchived
parameters.description:
Flag that indicate that we will return only versions with status Published and
Archived

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

200.description: Success. The list of data groups is returned

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

get.description:
• Returns all requirement sets and theirs requirements if specified in the parameter.
  • Returns only requirement sets by default.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: PolicyConfigurationAccess

parameters.name: includeRequirements
parameters.description: Flag to include requirements in the response.

parameters.name: versionsLimit
parameters.description: Optional limit on versions returned per jurisdiction. When omitted, all versions are returned.

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

200.description: Success. List of requirement sets data is returned

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

effectiveFrom.description: The date that the version takes effect when published

effectiveUntil.description: The calculated date that the version ceases being active

isActive.description:
The calculated flag to annotate whether this is the model's latest version
at the time of the query (not necessarily published)

signees.description: The defined list of signees for the version

version.description: Version number for given Aggregate (concurrency check)

notes.description:
Optional description of changes made that will be visible to all users who can access the version. It's assumed
that version notes won't contain 'personal identifiable information'. Please note that having many versions with
very long notes could hurt API performance in the long term.

mandatory.description: Mandatory Rule - does not allow empty value

specialCharacters.description:
Special characters validation rule - does not allow special characters,
but allows define array of characters which can be ignored by the validation

noNumbers.description: Validation rule that does not allow numbers

onlyInteger.description: Validation rule that allows only integers

noNegative.description: Validation rule that does not allow negative numbers

onlyDecimal.description: Validation rule that allows numbers up to two decimal places

regex.description: Validation rule that validates the value against provided regex

characterLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set minimum and maximum count of characters

numberLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set number range

noFutureDates.description: Validation rule that does not allow future dates

noPastDates.description: Validation rule that does not allow past dates

dateLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set date range

multiSelectLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set selection range

collectionMinimumCount.description: Validation rule that allows to set minimum count requirements for collection

collectionMaximumCount.description: Validation rule that allows to set maximum count requirements for collection

externalProvider.description: Validation rule that allows to use external provider for validation

externalDataGroupProvider.description: Validation rule that allows to use external provider for validation of one field with other fields as context

readOnly.description: Validation rule that allows to set if field should be read only

conditionalLimit.description: Validation rule that validates the dynamic value against provided condition

timeZoneId.description: Time zone id used for date values validation in order to determine exact Today time range

sourceEntityType.description: Any of the related party entity types selected can be counted toward this requirement

RequirementSetDto.description: Response DTO representing requirement set data

messages.description: List of Fenergo.Nebula.Platform.Core.Models.Response.ServiceResponseMessage associated to the service response

availableJurisdictions.description: List of available jurisdictions in which requirement sets are created

RequirementSetJurisdictionDto.description: Response DTO representing requirement sets jurisdictions available

data.description: Response DTO representing requirement sets jurisdictions available

messages.description: List of Fenergo.Nebula.Platform.Core.Models.Response.ServiceResponseMessage associated to the service response

id.description: The UiD of the requirement set version

setId.description: The UiD of the requirement set that the version belongs to

conditions.description: Conditions under which the requirement set can be applied

effectiveFrom.description: The date that the version takes effect when published

effectiveUntil.description: The calculated date that the version ceases being active

publicationDate.description: The date that the version got published

created.description: The creation date of the version

isActive.description:
The calculated flag to annotate whether this is the model's latest version
at the time of the query (not necessarily published)

signees.description: The defined list of signees for the version

version.description: Version number for given Aggregate (concurrency check)

notes.description:
Optional description of changes made that will be visible to all users who can access the version. It's assumed
that version notes won't contain 'personal identifiable information'. Please note that having many versions with
very long notes could hurt API performance in the long term.

RequirementSetVersionDto.description: Response DTO representing requirement set version data

data.description: Response DTO representing requirement set version data

jurisdiction.description:
(Deprecated - Use Jurisdictions instead)
Jurisdiction of the requirement

category.description: List of requirement category e.g. ["Basic Details", "Enrich Details"]

isSensitiveData.description: Sensitive data flag of the requirement

isIndexable.description: Requirement is data indexed for search flag

includeConditions.description:
Include conditions flag.
If true, include the Requirements containing conditions.
If false, only the Requirements without conditions will be returned.

type.description:
Type of the message
One of Info, Warning, Error, Forbidden

excludedCharacters.description: Array of special characters, which will be ignored by validation e.g. ["!","@","#"]

List of Fenergo.Nebula.Platform.Core.Models.Response.ServiceResponseMessage associated to the service response

isMandatory.description: Mandatory Rule - does not allow empty value

specialCharacters.description:
Special characters validation rule - does not allow special characters,
but allows define array of characters which can be ignored by the validation

noNumbers.description: Validation rule that does not allow numbers

onlyInteger.description: Validation rule that allows only integers

noNegative.description: Validation rule that does not allow negative numbers

onlyDecimal.description: Validation rule that allows numbers up to two decimal places

regex.description: Validation rule that validates the value against provided regex

characterLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set minimum and maximum count of characters

numberLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set number range

noFutureDates.description: Validation rule that does not allow future dates

noPastDates.description: Validation rule that does not allow past dates

dateLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set date range

multiSelectLimit.description: Validation rule that allows to set selection range

collectionMinimumCount.description: Validation rule that allows to set minimum count requirements for collection

collectionMaximumCount.description: Validation rule that allows to set maximum count requirements for collection

externalProvider.description: Validation rule that allows to use external provider for validation

externalDataGroupProvider.description: Validation rule that allows to use external provider for validating all fields of a DataGroup as a collection

ValidationDataDto.description: Request DTO representing validation data metadata

id.description: The UiD of the validation rule

setId.description: The UiD of the requirement set/data group

propertyId.description: The UiD of the requirement/data group field

propertyTypeId.description: The Guid containing the property type id

linkChildFieldPropertyName.description:
The string containing the property name child of this property, only has value when propertyType is set to
"selectLink"

linkedParentFieldPropertyName.description:
The string containing the property name parent of this property, only has value when propertyType is set to
"LinkedSelectV2" or "LinkedMultiSelectV2"

dataGroupId.description: The UiD of the of data group - is set only when requirement/data group field propertyType is set to "dataGroup"

isDataGroup.description: Flag indicating it is validation rules for data group field

validationData.description: Request DTO representing validation data metadata

value.description: Request DTO representing value limit rule metadata

priority.description: Priority of the value in case when multiple conditional values are evaluated
